chibi_core0.6.0

Module cache

Module Items

  • Structs

In crate chibi_core

chibi_core

Module cache 

Source
Expand description

Tool output caching for large results.

When tool outputs exceed the configured threshold, they are cached to disk and a truncated summary is sent to the LLM instead.

Structs§

CacheEntry
A cache entry representing a cached tool output
CacheMetadata
Metadata about a cached tool output

Functions§

cache_output
Cache tool output to disk
cleanup_old_cache
Clean up cache entries older than max_age_days Note: max_age_days is offset by 1, so:
clear_cache
Remove all cache files for a context
generate_cache_id 🔒
Generate a unique cache ID
generate_truncated_message
Generate a truncated message to send to the LLM instead of the full output
iter_cache_metadata 🔒
Iterate over cache metadata files in a directory. Yields (metadata_path, CacheMetadata) for each valid .meta.json file.
list_cache_entries
List all cache entries for a context
read_cache_grep
Search for a pattern in a cached file, returning matching lines with context
read_cache_head
Read the first N lines from a cached file
read_cache_lines
Read lines from start to end (1-indexed, inclusive)
read_cache_tail
Read the last N lines from a cached file
resolve_cache_path
Resolve a cache_id to its cache file path
should_cache
Check if content should be cached based on size threshold
